mapper.select: SELECT id, failure_id AS failureId, severity_level AS severityLevel, process_time AS processTime, process_description AS processDescription, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM failure_deal WHERE failure_id = #{failureId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO failure_deal ( failure_id, severity_level, process_time, process_description, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{failureId}, #{severityLevel}, #{processTime}, #{processDescription}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
